extra_outage_factors.load_stress_index: How close demand is to local grid stress; higher demand increases outage risk.
extra_outage_factors.rain_stress_index: Heavy rain can trigger line faults and access delays.
extra_outage_factors.feeder_congestion_index: Local feeder stress from evening and weekday demand.
extra_outage_factors.neighbor_outage_reports: Optional stretch signal: simulated nearby outage reports.
extra_outage_factors.transformer_age_years: Older equipment has higher fault risk.
extra_outage_factors.reserve_margin_index: Low reserve margin means one generator or feeder disturbance is harder to absorb.
extra_outage_factors.fuel_supply_risk_index: Fuel shortages or payment arrears can reduce available generation.
extra_outage_factors.hydro_inflow_stress_index: Drought or low inflow can reduce hydropower availability.
extra_outage_factors.vegetation_risk_index: Tree/vegetation exposure increases line fault risk.
extra_outage_factors.protection_miscoordination_index: Weak relay/protection coordination can make small faults trip wider areas.
extra_outage_factors.scada_telecom_risk_index: Control-center, telecom, or visibility problems delay response.
extra_outage_factors.non_technical_loss_index: Illegal tapping and hidden load can overload transformers/feeders.
extra_outage_factors.asset_health_index: Aging or stressed equipment is more likely to fail.
extra_outage_factors.der_backup_risk_index: Backup, solar, battery, or hybrid-system readiness can affect resilience during grid stress.
extra_outage_factors.primary_outage_driver: Plain-language top driver for dashboards and review.

ground_reality_note: The required brief columns are preserved; extra columns make outage causes visible and defendable.
